args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the end of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued to ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd exports has been finalized: all exported datasets will be deleted on 2026-06-13, 30 days after access revocation.

args.comment: Access revocation, refund, and deletion schedule all complete.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd offboarding is complete: data exported, access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, and deletion scheduled.

args.comment: Offboarding complete: export, revocation, refund, deletion schedule, and register entry all done.
